omitted_sections: Most biological examples and robot taxonomy in the Introduction
Detailed apparatus component list beyond parameters affecting interpretation

uncertain_items.detail: The abstract calls approximately 10 degrees the maximum anti-slip orientation, whereas Section 2.3.1 states that anti-slip resistance is strongest at 0 degrees. The body uses 10 degrees as a compromise between decreasing anti-slip resistance and increasing fracture path.
Panel (h) labels Lf in mm while panel (i) labels a comparable numerical range in micrometres. No reliable quantitative unit can be assigned across the panels.

uncertain_items.location: PDF p.7-8, Supplementary Notes 1-2 and Tables S1-S2
uncertain_items.detail: The workspace contains only the 13-page main PDF. Sensitivity and fit details cited in the supplementary material could not be visually checked.
Eq. (10) defines Ky, while the text and legend also use Ktotal for the composite normalized stiffness. The physical construction is clear, but variable names should be unified in implementation.

known_warnings: Fig. 6 is a morphology-driven theoretical prediction across materials, not force-angle experimental validation on rock or brick.
Fracture path length is only a geometric proxy; the paper provides no material strength, fracture energy or calibrated fracture-load law.
The pitch-angle input is a directional profile/slope distribution and must not be treated as a complete three-dimensional surface-normal model without reconstruction.
Eq. (7) requires an explicit principal-angle and wrap convention before coding.
Yaw results assume an isotropic Gaussian surface, zero-mean normal yaw distribution, linear axial stiffness and infinitesimal disturbances; no yaw-array experiment is reported.
The proposed pitch-yaw coupling in Section 3.2 is explicitly a hypothesis rather than a solved or validated coupled model.
character_count_method: Count of CJK Unified Ideographs after excluding display-formula blocks, Markdown table rows and image-link rows; up to 3500 allowed because the paper contains independent pitch and yaw models.
